title: Ukrainian Bitter Pancakes
description: A shaggy, ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly Ukrainian dish featuring pineapple juice and deep-frying.

ingredients.name: pineapple juice
ingredients.notes: use fresh juice for better flavor

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
In another bowl, whisk together the sugar, eggs, milk, and pineapple juice.
Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients and stir until well combined.
The batter should still be slightly lumpy.
Heat a tava-griddle or non-stick pan over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with your favorite toppings.
Repeat the process to make the remaining batter into 8-10 pancakes.
